creator: steve@Watt.COM
text:
It turns out the htdig patches are also broken.  If one turns off the checksum
checking, the patches don't apply to 2.1.10.

As I'm not hugely attached to the htdig functionality (and nor are my users),
I just shut it off.  The port without htdig works fine.

-- 
Steve Watt  KD6GGD  PP-ASEL-IA  ICBM:  121W 56' 57.8" / 37N 20' 14.9"
Internet:  steve @ Watt.COM                   Whois: SW32
Free time?  There's no such thing.  It just comes in varying prices...
